2_primaryJTBD.decision: What is my training focus this period and am I on track?

3_decisionVsInfoRatio.assessment: GOOD - Balanced decision/information for long-term planning tool
3_decisionVsInfoRatio.dominantDecision: Yes - Current period expansion is clear primary action

4_visualHierarchy.eyeLandsOnFirst: Timeline visualization with current period highlighted
4_visualHierarchy.heroElement: PeriodTimeline component showing year at a glance
4_visualHierarchy.assessment: EXCELLENT - Timeline-first design shows temporal context clearly

kpis.note: Shows where player is in annual cycle
Specific training priorities for each period

5_kpiQuality.assessment: EXCELLENT - Strong actionable metrics for planning

6_languageAndMentalModel.assessment: MODERATE - Mix of player and system language

7_flowAndNavigationCost.assessment: EXCELLENT - Inline expansion, no navigation required

8_stateCoverage.assessment: GOOD - Has loading and empty state for new players
gaps: No error handling visible for API failures

9_roleScalability.recommendation: Well-designed for all levels - visual timeline aids understanding

10_strategicVerdict.diagnosis: Solid annual planning tool with good temporal visualization
10_strategicVerdict.currentBehavior: Timeline + expandable period cards with focus areas
10_strategicVerdict.desiredBehavior: Timeline + expandable period cards with focus areas + progress tracking

topIssues.issue: No progress tracking within periods (are focus areas being worked on?)
topIssues.impact: Player can't see if they're executing the plan

topIssues.issue: No error handling for API failures
topIssues.impact: Silent failure if plan can't be loaded

topIssues.issue: Export functions may not be fully implemented (need to verify PDF/iCal generation)

10_strategicVerdict.structuralFix: Add progress indicators per focus area + add error handling + verify/complete export functionality

11_crossPageConsistency.note: Uses PageHeader + PageContainer pattern. Custom PeriodTimeline component (unique to annual planning). Integrates with usePlayerAnnualPlan hook.

stateHandling.empty: Empty state: 'Du har ingen årsplan ennå' with CTA to request one
stateHandling.error: No visible error handling in code

dataSource.note: Uses usePlayerAnnualPlan hook for real API data

accessibility.keyboardNav: Good - uses button elements for expansion

overallAssessment: GOOD - Solid annual planning visualization, needs progress tracking and error handling
